cases.title: Coding baseline through planner/executor/verifier
cases.objective: Produce a bounded code-change deliverable summary with independent verification.
cases.expectedDeliverable: Provide a coding deliverable summary and changed surface.
cases.executorDeliverable: Implemented bounded coding delta with evidence for review.

cases.title: Research baseline through planner/researcher/verifier
cases.objective: Summarize bounded research findings with citations and verification.
cases.expectedDeliverable: Provide a research synthesis with citations.
researchMaterials: Phase 1 established public regression, hidden holdout, rollback, and independent verifier.
Phase 2 established continuity state, initialize/resume/close flows, and handoff artifacts.
Phase 3 established lifecycle state machine, acceptance-driven closeout, and inspect API.

cases.title: Simple planning task falls back to single-agent path
cases.objective: Keep a trivial planning task on the single-agent path.
